creator: alex.ribper@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #3)


Hi

I have used your new port from cgx, the older port ( cgx v 2.11 ) will segfault if run  without the graphics card driver ( intel915 driver from ports ). When intel915.ko is loaded, it runs with no problem at all.

I am trying this in HardenedBSD amd64 everything built from ports :

uRRui@dARqsTar:~/Work/fem/CalculiX/SubZ/LowDStruc/SPHER2% uname -a
FreeBSD dARqsTar 11.0-STABLE-HBSD FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE-HBSD #1 : Mon Apr 10 05:55:56 EEST 2017     root@dARqsTar:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/HARDENEDBSD  amd64
uRRui@dARqsTar:~/Work/fem/CalculiX/SubZ/LowDStruc/SPHER2

it is a hardened ( sysctl parameters wise ) version of Freebsd 11.0.

best regards,

Alex

I cloned the repo of ports from HardenedBSD into a separate tree, and built it, for testing purposes.

git clone http://github.com/hardenedbsd/hardenedbsd-ports NewPortsTree, and the version in CAD/Calculix is 2.12... isnt this the correct one ?
